summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Nebula Library Steam Game Library app. All core functionality working correctly including backend APIs, frontend UI, Steam integration, theme switching, mobile responsiveness, and guest user features.

design_issues.issue: Console warning about missing Description or aria-describedby
design_issues.impact: Accessibility warning only, no functional impact

passed_tests: Backend health endpoint returns status ok and steam_key_configured true
Backend categories endpoint returns all 30 game categories
Backend Steam search API works with portal query
Backend Steam app details API returns Portal 2 data for app ID 620
Backend authentication properly returns 401 for unauthorized requests
Frontend loads with dark-blue theme correctly
Navbar displays Nebula Library logo and Login with Steam button
Theme switcher successfully changes between Dark Blue, Chrome, and Nature themes
Category filter bar shows 30+ categories with working scroll arrows
Add Game modal opens and functions properly with both search and URL tabs
Steam game search in modal returns 10 results for portal query
Guest user can add and remove games using localStorage
Game cards display with proper cover images and hover effects
Library search functionality filters games by name
Category filtering works correctly
Remove game button appears on hover and functions
Steam login redirects properly to steamcommunity.com OpenID
Mobile responsive design works with 2-column layout
Mobile menu and theme switching functions properly
Mobile modal responsiveness confirmed

success_percentage.frontend: 98% - All major functionality working, 1 minor accessibility warning
